title: Graphorkis bisdahliana
taxonomy: Graphorkis bisdahliana is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Graphorkis and the family Orchidaceae. Further, it is placed in the subfamily Orchidoideae. Within the Orchidaceae family, it is more specifically categorized as a type of terrestrial orchid. As a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae, it shares characteristics with other orchids in this subfamily.
